proposal1.heroHeadline: Vertexmedia is losing $200,000 annually on proposal inefficiencies. Here's how.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Your current proposal process takes hours away from revenue-generating tasks. Our system completes it in 47 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: These are ongoing losses that bleed resources and revenue.

problems.title: Time Drain
problems.description: Manual proposal creation consumes 10 hours a week. That is 520 hours a year not spent on expanding channels.

problems.title: Revenue Lost
problems.description: Every hour on proposals is an hour not closing deals. This costs Vertexmedia an estimated $50,000 in potential revenue annually.

problems.title: Brand Inconsistency
problems.description: Inconsistent branding in proposals undermines trust. This can lead to a 5% decrease in conversion rates, costing thousands.

problems.title: Operational Strain
problems.description: Proposal writing adds operational strain, counteracting your promise to simplify channel expansion. This strains your team and slows growth.

problems.title: Delayed Responses
problems.description: A delayed proposal can cost a client. Every day lost waiting is a day they might choose another provider, potentially costing you $10,000 per lost client.

problems.title: Tracking Issues
problems.description: Manually tracking proposal status is inefficient. Missed follow-ups mean missed opportunities, bleeding away potential deals.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI automation system replaces all these inefficiencies.

solutions.title: Instant Proposals
solutions.description: Currently, proposals take hours to prepare. Our system completes them in under 60 seconds, ready for client review.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Manual branding leads to inconsistencies. Our AI ensures every proposal is on-brand, enhancing client trust.

solutions.title: Operational Relief
solutions.description: Your team is bogged down by proposal creation. Our system frees them to focus on expanding channels and growing revenue.

solutions.title: Real-Time Tracking
solutions.description: Manually tracking proposals is inefficient. Our system offers real-time updates, ensuring no follow-up is missed.

solutions.title: Rapid Response
solutions.description: Delayed proposals cost clients. Our system's speed ensures your response time is unmatched, securing more deals.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Vertexmedia's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Vertexmedia around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Vertexmedia.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Unlock Untapped Revenue Growth with Vertexmedia's Expertise.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: We will guide Acme Corp to expand into new online marketplaces, minimizing operational strain while maximizing revenue.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is experiencing significant revenue losses due to missed opportunities in online marketplaces.

problems.title: Missed Market Opportunities
problems.description: By not being present on key online marketplaces, Acme Corp is losing potential daily revenue. This absence allows competitors to capture market share.

problems.title: Low Conversion Rates
problems.description: Every visitor leaving your website without purchasing is a lost sale. This trend results in thousands in lost revenue monthly.

problems.title: High Customer Acquisition Costs
problems.description: Without the right channels, customer acquisition costs skyrocket. Inefficient spending on marketing leads to an unsustainable growth model.

problems.title: Operational Strain
problems.description: Managing multiple sales channels is overwhelming. This strain can cause operational inefficiencies, leading to lost revenue.

problems.title: Lack of Brand Awareness
problems.description: Without a strong presence in digital marketplaces, Acme Corp struggles with brand visibility. This limits customer reach and potential sales.

problems.title: Ineffective Marketing Strategies
problems.description: Current marketing efforts are not optimized for conversion. This inefficiency results in wasted spend and lost potential revenue.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Vertexmedia's solutions directly address these revenue losses, transforming them into growth opportunities.

solutions.title: Channel Expansion Simplified
solutions.description: We simplify the process of expanding into new marketplaces, increasing your reach and sales potential.

solutions.title: Revenue Growth Strategy
solutions.description: Our strategy focuses on converting visitors to customers, turning potential losses into gains.

solutions.title: Operational Efficiency
solutions.description: We streamline operations to reduce strain, allowing your team to focus on growth.

solutions.title: Brand Visibility Enhancement
solutions.description: We enhance your digital presence, boosting brand recognition and customer engagement.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Vertexmedia is your ideal partner for navigating and conquering online marketplaces.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Expertise

whyUsCards.title: Tailored Strategies

whyUsCards.title: Data-Driven Decisions
whyUsCards.description: Our decisions are backed by data, ensuring the best outcomes for your business.

whyUsCards.title: Global Reach
whyUsCards.description: We help you tap into global markets, expanding your business's reach.
